notes: Pre-Raid Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Affliction Warlock Dps gear guide (pre-raid page, sourced from 5-man heroic dungeons, Emblems of Triumph/Frost, crafted profession items, and the Wrathgate/Argent Tournament questlines). Rings/Trinkets: the source page lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; the combined source text is kept as-is for both since Icy Veins doesn't map cost to item 1:1 in that row. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply pre-raid).

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 spellpower, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare)
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit), Rigid King's Amber for socket bonus
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
